user.title: Connect to your Teltonika router
user.description: Enter the details for your Teltonika router. The router must be reachable from Home Assistant.

data_description.modem: Usually '1-1' for single-modem devices like the RUTX11. SSH in and run: cat /etc/board.json | jsonfilter -e '@.modems[0].id'
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable if your router uses a self-signed certificate (recommended for most setups)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Check the IP address and ensure the router is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
